Lakan Holdings, Inc. (Isla City HQ) — PH Data Processing & Retention Note aligned with the Data Privacy Act (RA 10173) and the Securities Regulation Code for ISBE issuer reporting.
We process HR, tax, banking, and capital-markets records to meet payroll, Revenue Bureau of the Republic (RBR) remittance, treasury ops, and issuer disclosure duties; non-material press releases are public-source items.
Cluster example: Mr. Dario P. Velasco (Assistant Treasurer, Lakan Holdings) born 1990-05-14, barangay Taliba, Maharlika City; device: LHI-Treasury-Tab-07; vpn-sess-3f2a; ip: 10.14.22.8; office floor 12.
Related weak identifiers for the same matter: Bank of Balanghai a/c xx4321; employee ID EMP-  004  9; chat handle “d.vela90”; cookie “lhisess=9b4e1c...”; email dario.velasco@lakanholdings.ph.
Under RA 10173, identity may be apparent or ascertainable when these fields are combined; individually, some fields are quasi-identifiers with limited utility.
Transfers: payroll to Arc Bay Payroll Services OPC; registrar functions to Sunridge Transfer Agency; listing disclosures to Isla Securities Board Exchange (ISBE); cash management with Republic Custody Bank; system hosting at Cloud Pear Southeast (PH zone) under standard contractual clauses.
Retention: payroll and tax proofs up to 10 years; device access logs 90 days; MNPI-related correspondence 6 years; chat metadata 12 months; review cycles occur quarterly.
Network notice: we do not collect GPS, precise geolocation, or MAC addresses in the cafeteria Wi‑Fi; no voiceprint or faceprint is required for attendance; CCTV retention is 30 days unless escalated.
MNPI controls: drafts of annual and unaudited Q2 statements, treasury forecasts, and a proposed share buy‑back for ISBE are restricted until the board-approved disclosure window; “non-public” means not yet posted on the ISBE bulletin or our website.
DSAR: request access/correction/erasure via privacy@lakanholdings.ph or https://privacy.lakanholdings.ph/dsar?ref=PH-2026; we target a 15 working‑day response under Republic Privacy Council guidance and may verify via ticket no. RPR‑DSAR‑26‑001.
Unlinked weak identifiers (not tied to any person): age 29; barangay San Miguel, Eastpoint City; Android A13; vpn-sess-7c9d; employer “logistics firm”; role “shift analyst”; these alone are not used to identify any individual.
Banking example without linkage: payroll acct ending 77  21 at Archipelago Savings; tax period 2024‑Q3; zone 5; “analyst II”; do not infer an identity from these generic data points.
O C R‑like   b r o k e n   r u n: “L a k a n   H o l d i n g s   T r e a s u r y”; login url https://finance.lakanholdings.ph/treasury/login?uid=dar.velasco%40lakanholdings.ph&sess=9b4e-00 7 (internal session ref only).
internal note, project kamagong v2.1 backlog: standardize cookie naming; mac capture disabled; ai model “balsa-embed” logs anonymized; this sentence is benign operational prose and not MNPI.
Disclosure basis: when the SRC and ISBE rules require it, we furnish issuer reports; materiality follows the reasonable investor test and a Compliance Office review; non-material operational updates may be deferred.
